calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:38am
Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Smalll Claims Appeal. Appellants, Silvia Carol Forward does not appear. Respondent, Hernando Martinez-Vergara appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Seidenfeld.

9:48am

Matter is submitted.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-31-2011 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
